overview: Mummies One is a full-featured homemade bakery ordering system. Customers can browse items by category, place orders with delivery or pickup options, and choose their payment method. An admin panel lets the bakery owner manage products, categories, and track all orders in real time.
features: Product catalog with category filters (Cakes, Chocolates, Brownies, Cookies, Donuts)
Order flow with door delivery and self-pickup options
Date picker with minimum +1 day advance ordering
Admin dashboard with order and item management
Image upload for items via object storage
Green gradient bakery theme with logo
